hooks.command: cd /Users/chris/claude_projects/agent-system && FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && .venv/bin/ruff check "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null; exit 0

cd /Users/chris/claude_projects/agent-system && FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && echo 'Writing Python file — will lint after creation'; exit 0

cd /Users/chris/claude_projects/agent-system && FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && .venv/bin/ruff check "$FILE" 2>&1; exit 0
